name: Voice Input
description: Record microphone audio and transcribe it with a local whisper.cpp model.

fields.label: whisper.cpp executable path
fields.description: Path to whisper-cli.exe, whisper-cli, main.exe, or main.

fields.label: Managed model
fields.description: StackDock can download and use this model automatically.

fields.label: Custom model path
fields.description: Optional. Overrides the managed model when set.

fields.label: Language
fields.description: whisper.cpp language code. Use en for tiny.en models.
